userGroups.dailyValueTargetGroupName: Adults and children 4 or more years of age
userGroups.langualCodeDescription: Adults and Children 4 years and above

statements.notes: Vegetarian Formula

The hormone melatonin is secreted by the pineal gland and is important in the support of normal sleep patterns, as well as in the maintenance of the daily biorhythm. Stress, time zone changes and night time work all disturb melatonin metabolism. This product has been formulated in a lozenge form to ensure the fastest and most complete absorption of Melatonin into the bloodstream.

Melatonin is a hormone found in all living creatures. For humans, melatonin is best known for its ability to help regulate the circadian rhythm (better known as "the body's clock"), Melatonin is actually formed from tryptophan (an amino acid), which changes to 5-HTP, then to serotonin (a neurotransmitter), and then to melatonin. Melatonin signals help to support healthy sleep-wake cycles in humans. Normal melatonin cycles can be disrupted when we are exposed to excessive light in the evening or too little light during the daytime. Moreover, jet lag and shift work can also disrupt melatonin cycles. 
This non-animal derived product comes in a lozenge form for better and faster absorption.

Cautions and Interactions
Melatonin may be indicated for some forms of occasional sleeplessness and other disturbances of normal sleep function. Research results are mixed with respect to claims that melatonin can abolish some of the symptoms of jet lag.

Guaranteed Quality
This is an FDA-regulated dietary supplement that is produced in an FDA- and third party-inspected facility. We are certified for producing dietary supplements and USDA Organic products using Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP). All ingredients are quality tested to meet or exceed specifications. Our quality team goes above and beyond standard quality control to ensure the safety and efficacy of this supplement. We utilize advanced analytical and microbiological testing methods, with capabilities that are state-of-the-art and exceed basic lab requirements.
This product contains an Ageless(R) anti-oxygen packet to enhance protection during storage.
SUGGESTED USAGE: As a dietary supplement, take one lozenge just prior to bedtime as needed. Chew lozenge or hold in mouth until dissolved and swallow.
Protocol For Life Balance(R) Melatonin is synthesized according to the highest pharmaceutical standards of quality and purity. Protocol For Life Balance(R) Melatonin is not animal derived.

Cautions: If you are under medical supervision seek the advice of your physician or health care professional prior to use. Individuals with auto-immune conditions, depressive disorders, those taking sedatives or corticosteroid drugs, or pregnant or lactating women, should consult their physician prior to use. This product may cause drowsiness. Do not operate a vehicle or heavy machinery following consumption of melatonin.
Keep out of reach of children.
CODE P3258 V2
- Chewable
- With 3 mg Vitamin B6

- Fast Absorption
10% of profits donated for health research
A Dietary Supplement
GMP
Made in the U.S.A.
Contains no salt, starch, yeast, wheat, gluten, soy, milk, egg or preservatives.
Vegetarian/Vegan Formula.
Do Not Eat Freshness Packet. Keep in Bottle.
Store in a cool, dry place.
Please Recycle.
Peel Here for more information

Individuals with asthma, auto-immune conditions, depressive disorders, diabetes, epilepsy, those taking sedatives or corticosteroid drugs, or pregnant or lactating women, should consult their physician prior to use.
These statements have not been evaluated by the FDA. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.
